Title: Chuyên Viên Đào Tạo Sản Xuất
Market Strategist Deputy Manager (Softline - Consumer Insights)
Company: Công Ty TNHH Aeon Việt Nam
Location: 30 Bo Bao Tan Thang, Son Ky Ward, Tan Phu Dist, HCMC, 30 Tân Thắng, Phường Sơn Kỳ, Quận Tân Phú, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh
Job Description:
Primary Objective:
A Market Strategist creates and executes strategies that align market opportunities with product offerings by conducting market research, analyzing customer needs, identifying trends, and defining new product concepts to drive growth and brand positioning. This role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to inform product roadmaps, validate ideas, and oversee successful product launches, ultimately ensuring products meet market demands and company objectives.
Key Activities:
• Research market, customers, and competitors → identify unmet needs.
• Build Product concepts (i.e “Basic & Lifestyle”, “Sustainable Fashion line”...)
• Identify Value Proposition of Products/Category: Target Pricing, Sales contribution, GP, expected volume, Category role.
• Work with PB MD, PBA & Technologists to ensure feasibility.
• Provide product direction to Merchandisers for execution.
Roles and responsibilities:
List in order of importance the major responsibilities of the job and estimate the percentage of time spent on each responsibility (the main function of the job may or may not be the one where the most time is spent).
1. Market Research & Consumer Insights (30%)
- Conduct in-depth 3C analysis (Customer, Competitor, Company) to identify consumer preferences, emerging trends, and potential opportunities for product innovation.
- Proactively identify new market opportunities and potential risks related to product development and market fit.
- Prioritize categories/sub-categories for PB development based on market opportunity.
- Interpret research insights into long-term PB development strategies.
- Lead innovation initiatives, identifying emerging trends and opportunities in PB.
2. Product Concept & Proposal Development (30%)
- Define the product vision and strategy, market positioning, translating market insights into actionable plans for new products or enhancements that address market gaps and customer needs.
- Inform and shape the long-term product proposals and category roadmap by providing strategic insights and validating product ideas.
- Lead category and portfolio planning and ensure concepts align with company vision.
- Validate commercial feasibility: target margin, positioning, differentiation.
- Provide final endorsement before PB products move to execution stage.
- Integrate sustainability and customer lifestyle trends into PB development strategy.
3. Cross-Functional Collaboration (20%)
- Act as the strategic bridge between Merchandisers, Technologists, PBA and related departments.
- Align directions with Manager/General Manager and ensure team execution consistency to deliver consistent PB direction..
- Ensure PB product direction aligns with corporate strategy, not just sales KPIs.
4. Performance Monitoring & Strategic Improvement (10%)
- Review overall category performance against business objectives.
- Recommend strategic adjustments to PB portfolio and market positioning.
5. Other Duties (10%)
Any necessary task that is deemed important from time to time.
Job Requirements: Mức độ phù hợp và xếp hạng của bạn so với ứng viên khác như thế nào?

Title: Vision Engineer
Location: Thang Long IP, Hanoi, Thang Long II IP, Hung Yen (Daily Shuttle from Hanoi/ Hai Duong/ Bac Ninh)
Job Description:
Job Purpose
Research, develop and design automation machine programs, especially vision inspection systems and vision-based robot applications, to support mass production with high quality, productivity and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities
1. Vision & Automation System Development
• Develop concept and process flow for new vision inspection machines.
• Design and program PLC, Vision system and robot control (C++, image processing).
• Design electrical hardware and control software for automation machines.
• Research and apply new technologies to production equipment.
• Build technical requirements and cooperate with external suppliers in machine design.
• Prepare machine operation instructions, setup conditions and related documentation.
• Participate in machine build, debug, adjustment, trial run and improvement with suppliers and pilot teams.
• Support machine readiness for mass production and follow up production feedback after MP.
2. Troubleshooting & Problem Solving
• Troubleshoot quality and technical issues related to machines, jigs and vision systems during trial, pre-MP and MP phases.
• Analyze root causes of machine errors and implement corrective actions to ensure stable operation.
3. Continuous Improvement
• Work with Process Engineering, Production and Quality teams to improve equipment capability, productivity and quality.
• Provide feedback and improvement ideas for new machine designs to address chronic quality or productivity issues.
• Contribute to cost reduction and efficiency improvement activities.
4. Equipment & Documentation Management
• Prepare and release BOM lists and assembly diagrams for machine build.
• Manage and maintain I/O maps, ensuring consistency with actual machine conditions.
5. Supplier Support
• Support suppliers during setup, trial and debugging of new machines or processes.
6. Compliance & System Contributions
• Comply with company rules, procedures and policies related to:
• 6S & KAIZEN
• EHS (Environmental, Health & Safety)
• EICC & Social Responsibility
• Protection of company assets
• Actively support Molex TQM, Six Sigma, ISO and EHS Management Systems.
7. Other Tasks
• Perform other relevant duties as assigned by management.

Title: Identity & Access Management Engineer (Identity Engineer/ IAM Engineer)
Location: A5 Building, Parcel A5, E-Office Park, Sang Tao Street, Tan Thuan EPZ, Tan Thuan Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, A5 Building, Parcel A5, E-Office Park, Sang Tao Street, Tan Thuan EPZ, Tan Thuan Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Job Description:
A Brief Overview
We are seeking a skilled and dynamic IAM Engineer IV to join our IAM team. This role is pivotal in leading the design engineering of MiTek's secure authentication and authorization services. The ideal candidate will take a hands-on approach to the design process for our company's IAM solutions while serving as a thought leader in the Identity & Access Management space. They will also focus on optimizing the performance, stability, and availability of our IAM infrastructure while serving as a top-tier escalation point for all other IAM engineers.

Responsibilities
• Lead efforts to ensure that relevant privileged access controls are adequately enforced across platforms and applications
• Plan integrations with authentication services enabled by Ping Identity or Entra ID solutions.
• Maintain expert knowledge of industry standards and best practices surrounding IAM technologies and apply them to daily operations.
• Evangelize a "security by design" approach within IAM processes, promoting a secure culture across the organization.
• Serve as the subject matter expert while working with cross-functional teams to identify potential IAM challenges and implement innovative solutions.
• Actively participate in local IAM and cybersecurity working groups to stay updated on the latest trends and technologies.
• Serve as the top-tier escalation point for IAM solutions, including Microsoft Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID, and Ping Identity
• Accountable for DR exercises, and designing solutions and processes to eliminate or reduce off hours support calls.

Title: Marketing Executive
Location: 149A Nguyễn Phúc Nguyên, phường 9, Quận 3, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, District 3, HCM City
Job Description:
Mô tả công việc
• Xây dựng kế hoạch và triển khai các hoạt động Digital Marketing trên đa nền tảng (Social Media, Search, Email, Influencer), đồng thời liên tục theo dõi và tối ưu hiệu quả chiến dịch.
• Phối hợp chặt chẽ với team Thiết kế và Kinh doanh trong việc truyền thông các bộ sưu tập mới, chiến dịch theo mùa và các hoạt động bán hàng.
• Làm việc cùng team Content để phát triển định hướng nội dung, đảm bảo tính sáng tạo và nhất quán với hình ảnh thương hiệu.
• Quản lý nội dung trên website: cập nhật sản phẩm, viết mô tả sản phẩm hấp dẫn, đồng thời theo dõi và cải thiện tỷ lệ chuyển đổi.
• Lập kế hoạch và vận hành các chiến dịch quảng cáo trả phí trên Meta, TikTok và Google, với mục tiêu tối ưu chi phí và hiệu quả kinh doanh.
• Theo dõi, phân tích và báo cáo hiệu suất chiến dịch thông qua Google Analytics và các công cụ đo lường, từ đó đề xuất điều chỉnh phù hợp.
• Triển khai các hoạt động SEO cho nội dung website (mô tả sản phẩm, lookbook, blog) nhằm tăng trưởng traffic tự nhiên và cải thiện thứ hạng tìm kiếm.
• Cập nhật xu hướng thị trường, theo dõi hoạt động của đối thủ và đề xuất các hướng đi phù hợp để nâng cao năng lực cạnh tranh của thương hiệu.

Title: Assistant Manager (Marketing & Technical Sales)
Location: Hà Nội, Việt Nam, Hanoi / HCMC
Job Description:
Mô tả công việc


Chức vụ ASSISTANT MANAGER -MARKETING & SALES KỸ THUẬT với công việc:
• Hỗ trợ Ban lãnh đạo xây dựng và triển khai chiến lược kinh doanh & marketing
• Tìm kiếm, phát triển khách hàng mới trong và ngoài nước (B2B)
• Khai thác thị trường mới, mở rộng kênh bán hàng Nghiên cứu, đề xuất sản phẩm mới phù hợp nhu cầu thị trường
• Trực tiếp giao dịch, đàm phán với khách hàng quốc tế
• Phối hợp với bộ phận kỹ thuật để tư vấn giải pháp sản phẩm
• Đọc hiểu bản vẽ kỹ thuật, thông số sản phẩm để trao đổi với khách hàng
• Xây dựng tài liệu marketing, catalogue, proposal, báo giá
• Tham gia triển lãm, hội chợ, hoạt động xúc tiến thương mại
• Tham gia xây dựng chiến lược bán hàng và phát triển thị trường
• Theo dõi, phân tích số liệu kinh doanh, lập báo cáo định kỳ
• Phân tích thị trường thế giới để đưa ra sản phẩm với giá thành và chất lượng phù hợp
• Phân tích thị trường thế giới trong chu kỳ dài hạn để đưa ra định hướng sản phẩm
• Làm việc trực tiếp với ban giám đốc, đối tác quốc tế (tiếng Anh & tiếng Trung)
• Tham gia đàm phán hợp đồng, làm việc với khách hàng
• Điều phối các phòng ban liên quan để đảm bảo tiến độ công việc
• Các công việc khác theo chỉ đạo của Tập đoàn & Công ty.

Title: 2026 Management Trainee
Company: Công Ty Điện Tử Thông Minh TCL (Việt Nam)
Location: 21st Floor, Peak View Tower, No. 36 Hoang Cau Street, 5F, Lottery Tower, No. 77 Tran Nhan Ton st., Tầng 5, Toà Nhà Lottery Tower, 77 Trần Nhân Tôn, Phường 9, Quận 5, TP. Hồ Chí Minh
Job Description:
TCL Vietnam proudly introduces the Management Trainee Program 2026 — a dynamic journey designed to nurture high-potential young talents into the next generation of leaders across various functions.

Through hands-on field experience, deep product knowledge, cross-departmental exposure and real-world business challenges, you will gain a full understanding of how a global brand operates. Guided by experienced mentors, you will build a strong foundation in leadership, strategic thinking, and problem-solving.
At TCL Vietnam, we invest in your long-term growth. Our goal is to prepare you for managerial roles within 3 years, equipping you with the expertise, vision, and drive to lead, innovate, and inspire in any area aligned with your skills and interests — whether it’s sales, marketing, logistics, human resources, finance, product operations, after-sales service or beyond.

1. Experience Store Operations:
Start your journey at the TCL Experience Store, where you’ll:
- Learn the fundamentals of retail sales.
- Be involved in selling products as a Product Consultants (PC) and assist customers directly.
- Manage display setups, in-store merchandising, and POSM.
- Understand store operations from the ground up.
2. Become a Retail Supervisor:
Once you master the store, you’ll move on to supervise multiple stores:
- Lead and train frontline staff.
- Drive sell-out performance.
- Monitor trade programs and in-store execution.
3. Explore Other Departments (Based on performance & potential):
- Sales – Manage key retail partners or regional sales activities.
- Marketing – Drive campaigns, branding, and customer engagement.
- E-commerce or Product – Join departments shaping the digital and product strategy.
- Logistics – Oversee supply chain, inventory, and distribution efficiency.
- Finance – Manage budgets, forecasts, and financial performance analysis.
- Human Resources (HR) – Talent acquisition, development, and employee engagement.
- After-sales Service – Ensure customer satisfaction and after-sales support.

Title: Quality Manager
Company: Công Ty TNHH C-Hawk Technology Việt Nam
Location: Phú Tân, Thành phố Thủ Dầu Một, Bình Dương, Việt Nam, Khu công nghiệp Phú Tân, Thủ Dầu Một, Bình Dương, TP. HCM
Job Description:
DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:
• Creating, supervising, and maintaining Quality Management policies and procedures by ISO 9001 & 14001 standard requirements
• Monitoring all actions to ensure compliance with Quality and Environment regulations, monitors risk and contributes suggestions to the Board of Directors for risk mitigation.
• Managing the implementation/deployment of system enhancements/new systems at work.
• Monitoring all quality-related activities of the company.
• Ensuring that products adhere to quality standards.
• Contributing and working closely with department Managers for future improvements and/or systems enhancement.
• Closely working with teams (internal and external) to consolidate necessary documents.
• Preparing and providing quality reports to management and customers on a weekly, monthly, and quarterly basis when required.
• Controlling documents including document management systems, documents, and reports, produce.
• Planning, Performing, and Supporting all internal and external audits on behalf of the company management.
• Monitor, measure, and evaluate performance, skills, working attitude, and completion of the assigned work of all employees in the department.
• Timely handling of nonconform actions in the company, and at the same time discussing with the Board of Directors to offer improving solutions and prevent the recurrence of nonconform actions.
• Directly handle customer feedback on quality.
• Monitoring the timely completion of corrective and preventive actions on NCRs, and CARs.
• Performs other related duties as assigned.
• Ensuring the Working Environment, Health, and Safety (EHS).

Title: Facilities Engineer (Maintenance & HVAC)
Company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
Location: 29 Lieu Giai, Ngoc Khanh, Ba Dinh Dist., Hanoi, Etown Building, 364 Cong Hoa Street, Tan Binh Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Job Description:
• Plan and execute preventive and corrective maintenance programs for facilities, equipment, and company assets to ensure system reliability and prompt response to operational or emergency issues.
• Manage daily technical operations related to facilities equipment, troubleshooting, repairs, and maintenance activities across all company properties to maintain service continuity.
• Supervise and coordinate third-party service providers and maintenance contractors by managing service contracts and monitoring work quality, safety, and compliance with technical scopes.
• Ensure timely handling of maintenance requests by coordinating resources and monitoring execution to meet established operating norms and service standards.
• Plan and oversee facilities fit-out, renovation, refurbishment, and improvement projects by defining scope, timelines, cost estimates, and contingencies for effective project delivery.
• Coordinate cross-functionally with PRS and EHS teams to support emergency preparedness, safety inspections, and compliance with fire safety, evacuation, and workplace safety requirements.
• Support procurement and audit activities by coordinating with purchasing for technical procurement needs and participating in audits, inspections, and regulatory assessments as required.
• Execute assigned technical projects and improvement tasks by supporting additional company projects and initiatives within defined technical scope and management direction.

Title: Manufacturing Quality Assurance Engineer (Optical Devices)
Location: Thang Long II IP, Hung Yen, Hà Nội, Việt Nam, Thang Long II IP, Hung Yen (Daily Shuttle from Hanoi/ Hai Duong/ Bac Ninh)
Job Description:
Manufacturing Quality Assurance Engineer (Optical Devices)
Location: Thang Long II IP, Hung Yen (Daily Bus from Hanoi and Hai Duong)
Reports to: Quality Manager
Contacts: Internal teams, suppliers, customers

MOLEX, a brand under KOCH Industries with its headquarters in Lisle, Illinois (USA), is one of the world’s leading interconnector manufacturers.

Since 2007, Molex Vietnam has operated its first factory in Thang Long I IP. We are now expanding with a new high tech facility in Thang Long II IP, Hung Yen, backed by a $145 million investment and spanning 100,000 m². This site will manufacture advanced products including high-speed connectors, cables, and optical devices.

Role Overview
Lead and support in‑process quality for fiber‑optic cables, ensuring production meets quality, productivity, and delivery targets while driving continuous improvement.

Key Responsibilities
• Maintain and enforce in‑process quality standards and work instructions for optical products.
• Conduct inspections, audits, and in‑process evaluations; analyze defects and issue reports.
• Train and guide team members on product specs, standards, equipment setup, and operations.
• Monitor defect rate, scrap, material usage, and inspection cost; coordinate improvement actions across departments.
• Participate in quality meetings, defect analysis, customer complaint handling, sorting activities, and PFMEA.
• Support trial runs, transfers, new product development, and supplier/vendor assessments.
• Lead and contribute to quality improvement projects.
• Manage team performance and promote company culture as a PBM role model.
• Ensure compliance with 7S, Kaizen, EHS, EICC/Social Responsibility, and company policies.
• Support Molex TQM, Six Sigma, ISO, and EH&S systems.

Title: Specialist, Product Engineer (NPI/NPD)
Company: Công Ty TNHH Pandora Production Việt Nam
Location: Số 6 Đường số 3, Khu công nghiệp Việt Nam - Singapore III, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Vietnam - Singapore Industrial Park III, Hoi Nghia Ward, Tan Uyen, Binh Duong
Job Description:
About Pandora
Pandora is the world's largest jewellery brand, specialising in the design, crafting and marketing of accessible luxury jewellery made from high-quality materials. Each piece is created to inspire self-expression, allowing people to share their stories and passions through meaningful jewellery. Pandora jewellery is sold in more than 100 countries through 6,800 points of sale, including more than 2,700 concept stores.
Headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, Pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide and crafts its jewellery using only recycled silver and gold. Pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and has set out to halve greenhouse gas emissions across its value chain by 2030. Pandora is listed on the Nasdaq Copenhagen stock exchange and generated revenue of DKK 31.7 billion (EUR 4.2 billion) in 2024.
About Pandora Production Vietnam
Pandora’s new jewellery crafting facility is located in the Vietnam–Singapore Industrial Park III (VSIP III), about 40 km north of Ho Chi Minh City. When fully scaled, the state-of-the-art facility will produce up to 60 million jewellery pieces annually and employ around 7,000 craftspeople. It is powered entirely by renewable energy and built to LEED Gold certification standards.

Main purpose of the role:
Contribute product information package handover (Insourcing, Double SKUs, and NPD) from technical intake to pre-production readiness, ensuring optimal cost, quality, manufacturability, and appearance. Validate samples, mitigate risks, and maintain technical standards while collaborating closely with Pre-Production and Local OEM suppliers to meet design, regulatory, and quality requirements.

Key accountabilities:
Technical Intake & Development Support
• Collect and interpret the Product Information Package for Insourcing, Double SKUs, and New Product Development from the I&PD Product Engineer (Thailand).
• Provide technical input to Pre-Production on product design, materials, tooling, and process selection, with focus on target cost, quality, production capability, and visual alignment to design intent.
Sample Validation & Quality Conformance
• Validate and monitor pre-production and production samples against product specifications, test methods, and look & feel requirements using original references.
• Ensure samples meet internal quality standards, regulatory requirements, and customer expectations before gate approvals.
Risk Assessment & Cost Optimization
• Conduct DFM and process risk assessments to identify potential failure modes and bottlenecks.
• Optimize product design, materials, and manufacturing techniques to achieve target cost without compromising performance, safety, or reliability.
Issue Management & Continuous Improvement
• Investigate and validate issues found during the prototype phase, consolidate cross-functional feedback, and drive corrective and preventive actions to minimize defects and rework in the PM phase.
Standards & Documentation Governance
• Review, release, and maintain standards, specifications, drawings, and BOMs for materials, components, product masters, and finished products.
• Ensure all technical documentation complies with design requirements, regulatory obligations, and quality standards; manage revision control and traceability.
Supplier Technical Collaboration
• Serve as the technical interface with Local OEM suppliers, ensuring adherence to specifications, standards, approved materials, and process controls.
Cost Control:
• Provide technical input for the Costing team to calculate cost.
• Find a solution in terms of product design to reduce costs when they exceed the target.
Continuous Improvement:
• Implementing processes for continuous improvement in product design, development, and manufacturing to enhance product quality, reduce costs, and increase efficiency.
• Product Information package handover on-time

Title: Sales Tour Inbound (English/ German/ French/ Italian Speaking)
Location: 33B Phạm Ngũ Lão, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội, Khách sạn ATS , Số 33B Phạm Ngũ Lão, Phường Phan Chu Trinh, Quận Hoàn Kiếm, Thành phố Hà Nội
Job Description:
Main tasks
Manage and work directly with clients following sales procedure
- Create travel programs to meet a client's expectations and satisfy clients' demands
- To be proactive in promoting Easia's new products to clients & regularly remind them about Easia's new production
- Update and advise on information related to destinations and services to clients
- To take part in annual strategic works of the team & be in charge of setting sales targets for assigned clients
- Analyze the conversion rate of each client every month and do the proper follow-up on every request sent to clients
- To be in charge of the annual process of renewing client products.
- Manage clients' information and ensure information security
- Complete and update clients' profiles on customer software
- Work closely with the Operation Department to solve problems arising on the spot as well as reply to clients' complaints
- Understand competitors of the destination

Work with the Sales team leader on assigned prospects
- To analyze the existing product of prospects
- To create a tour program to match prospects' expectations
- To understand the competition and react accordingly
- Follow up with prospects about their feedback on our products
- Update the feedback of prospects to SDM & related departments

Other Tasks
- Complete other tasks assigned by STL (such as training newcomers, backing up another team member, and preparing reports…).
- Attend weekly Team meetings.
- Join inspection trips
- Escort client FAM trips
- Attend training courses to improve skills as well as work performance
- Actively take part in the evaluation process of the department and the Company

Title: Senior Procurement Specialist - Good English
Company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Sữa Quốc Tế LOF
Location: 217 Nguyễn Văn Thu, phường Đakao, quận 1, TP.HCM, 217 Nguyễn Văn Thủ, Phường Đa Kao, Quận 1, TP.HCM
Job Description:
Mô tả công việc
• Lead the operational procurement and responsible for domestic and oversea sourcing, purchasing and monitor delivery, payment.
• Negotiate contracts, improve prices and terms of business with suppliers and review opportunities to make business saving utilizing negotiation and purchasing best practice tools and methods.
• Prepare and process purchase orders and documents in accordance with company policies, procedures, and specifications.
• Working with forwarders to do customs clearance the imported goods (machines and materials/ packaging) applied for oversea suppliers.
• Work with oversea toller and follow up OEM orders & payment.
• Ensure procurement operations and workflows comply with regulatory safety and quality requirements.
• Implement and operate SAP system to manage and maintain high quality and accurate data records of purchases, shipments, supply of goods, etc.
• Build and maintain effective partnerships with suppliers to leverage on the opportunities of cost reduction and service efficiency.
• Prepare and submit weekly/monthly procurement reports to key stakeholders.
• Identify process improvement opportunities to deliver value and reduce cost in the procurement process.
• Evaluate vendor performance to propose recommendations for future business dealings.
• Explore alternative sources for goods, service, materials.
• Other tasks and responsibilities as assigned.
